description: Binance Nigeria hosts the opening ceremony for the Binance Masterclass Developer Edition, aiming to train 1,000 developers in Africa. The event features community engagement and giveaways, including $200 for the first 20 participants who fill out a Google form.
topic_summary: Binance's initiative to educate and empower developers in Africa through a masterclass program, promoting blockchain technology and community involvement. Special guests and community members participate in the event [t=15:28].
